name: Patissciel Couverture
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖菓使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パティシエル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クーベル
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If you have no card in your other Pendulum Zone: You can place 1 face-up Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck in your Pendulum Zone. You can only use this effect of "Patissciel Couverture" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
2 Pendulum Monsters
If this card in the Monster Zone is destroyed: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone.
pend_eff: If you have no card in your other Pendulum Zone: You can place 1 face-up Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck in your Pendulum Zone. You can only use this effect of "Patissciel Couverture" once per turn.
